description: You are a forensic technician digitizing a field sketch. Open the garage floor plan at '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan.dxf' and create two new layers: 'EVIDENCE' (Color: Red) and 'MEASUREMENTS' (Color: Blue). On the 'EVIDENCE' layer, mark Item 1 (Shell Casing) with a circle (radius 50) centered at (4500, 2500) and Item 2 (Crowbar) with a line from (5000, 3000) to (5600, 3200). Label these items on the 'EVIDENCE' layer using text height 100 ('E1' near the circle and 'E2' near the crowbar). On the 'MEASUREMENTS' layer, draw triangulation lines for Evidence 1 from its center (4500, 2500) to Reference Point A (0, 0) and Reference Point B (6000, 0). Save the annotated drawing as '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/crime_scene.dxf'.
